subcodes.first_line: O Lord! This is Thy servant who hath turned toward the light of Thy mercy, and who hath been drawn to the fragrances of the gardens of Thy oneness, and hath expended himself [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب هذا عبدک الذی توجه الی نور رحمانیتک و انجذب بنفحات ریاض احدیتک و انفق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
